content_body: This is a vacation that I wish I could have stayed another week. This was a time for us to relax and enjoy one another's company since one of us is from Ohio and the other from Florida. I loved this place, and we will never forget The Rivers Edge. It was very tranquil, and so, so peaceful. I feel I can finally breathe. Too much stress in life will make your spirit weary. Thank you for having my family and I stay here!
title: Wish We Could Have Stayed Longer!
